title: KATHMANDU COUNTRYSIDE HIKE
highlights: Short and easy trekking near Kathmandu valley
Spectacular mountainous view
Insightful and architectural Namo Buddha monastery
Traditional life style of local people & culture
Buddhist norms, meditation and yoga activities
Mixture lifestyle of Aryan, Tibetan & Newari culture
description: Chisapani-Nagarkot-Dhulikhel-Namo Buddha- Kathmandu trek is one of the easier trekking trail in Nepal designed to explore nature and culture of Nepal’s countryside and the amazing mountain views. This trek is also known as Around Kathmandu Valley Trek. It is an excellent trek for those who wish to avoid a long, strenuous trek or have time only for a short and easy trek and fit for all age group and for all seasons.

itinerary.title: Drive to Sundarijal & trek to Chisapani (2160m)
itinerary.desc: Take a short drive from Kathmandu to Sundarijal and start our trekking to Chisapani where you will be enjoying the real beauty of nature with the Himalayan view.

itinerary.title: Chisopani – Nagarkot (2175m)
itinerary.desc: Today we hike towards Nagarkot. It is the famous panoramic hillside from where we can get picturesque view of sunrise and sunset.

itinerary.title: Nagarkot – Dhulikhel (1550m)
itinerary.desc: Our journey continues to Dhulikhel from Nagarkot. Dhulikhel is the trade hub for the surrounding places and ancient Nepal- Tibet trade point where we can see the Newari and Nepali lifestyle.

itinerary.title: Dhulikhel – Namo Buddha (1810m)
itinerary.desc: The trail proceeds through unspoiled villages. Eventually, after 5/6 hrs treks bring you to a Tibetan Buddhist village Namobuddha with beautiful chorten and monastery.

itinerary.title: Namo Buddha – Panauti – Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Trek to legendary village Panauti and explore ancient temples. After lunch drive to historical heritage site Bhaktapur and then back to Kathmandu.

title: FAMILY HOLIDAY
highlights: UNESCO world heritage sites in Kathmandu
Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
Trishuli River Rafting experience
Wildlife Safari in Chitwan National Park
4 days trekking to Ghorepani Poonhill
Lake city Pokhara exploration
description: This is an outstanding tour package to spend a quality holiday with your family around the Himalaya. The holiday with your family and kids in Nepal starts from the capital city of Kathmandu, traveling through scenic Pokhara, wild Chitwan, and completing with a beautiful trek to Poonhill.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport, transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath, Bhaktapur Durbar Square, and Patan Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
itinerary.desc: Drive towards Thankot for a cable car tour with panoramic views of Kathmandu valley and Himalayan ranges.

itinerary.title: Trishuli Rafting - Drive to Chitwan
itinerary.desc: Fun filled rafting from Fishling to Kurintar, then drive towards Chitwan National Park.

itinerary.title: Chitwan Jungle Activities
itinerary.desc: Elephant ride, canoe ride, bird watching, elephant bathing, and village tour.

itinerary.title: Chitwan - Pokhara Drive
itinerary.desc: Short bird watching at Chitwan, drive to Pokhara, and boating tour at Fewa Lake.

itinerary.title: Drive to Naya Pul and trek to Ulleri
itinerary.desc: Start the trekking portion of the trip with an amazing view on the trail.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ulleri to Ghorepani
itinerary.desc: Walk through lush forests with exclusive mountain views of Annapurna South.

itinerary.title: Sunrise at Poon Hill & trek to Ghandruk
itinerary.desc: 45 minutes upward hike to Poon Hill for a mighty Himalayan sunrise view.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghandruk back to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Head back to Naya Pul through green forests and drive back to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing & fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Sunrise at Sarangkot, city tour (Davis Fall, Gupteswor Cave), and short flight back to Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to the airport for final departure.

title: LUMBINI TOUR
highlights: UNESCO world heritage site
Birth place of Gautam Buddha
Central attraction for Buddhist pilgrimage
Mayadevi temple from 3rd century
Ashoka pillar from 249 B.C
International Buddhist monasteries
description: Lumbini is one of the popular tourist destinations of Nepal. It is the birthplace of Gautam Buddha, famously known as the capital of Buddhism, situated in the Southern Terai at an altitude of 600 ft.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Scenic 7-8 hours drive to Lumbini. Stroll around the local market in the evening.

itinerary.title: Explore Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Visit Lumbini Garden, Maya Devi Temple, Pushkarni Pool, and various international monasteries (Thai, Sri Lankan, Chinese, etc.).

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 7-8 hours scenic drive back to Kathmandu with views of Himalayas, rivers, and jungles.

title: CHITWAN JUNGLE SAFARI
highlights: Elephant Safari and Jeep Drive
Canoe ride along the Rapti River
Tharu Cultural Program and Village Tour
Bird Watching and Elephant Breeding Center
Chance to see Rhino, Tiger, and Crocodile
description: Chitwan is one of the most adventurous and exciting places in Nepal. The major activities during the safari are focused on being part of the wild nature while staying in luxury accommodations.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Tharu Village Tour
itinerary.desc: Village tour, National Park Visitor's center, sunset view, and Tharu cultural dance.

itinerary.title: Canoe Ride & Elephant Safari
itinerary.desc: Morning canoe ride, bird watching, crocodile spotting, and afternoon elephant safari to see rhinos and other wildlife.

itinerary.title: Elephant Breeding Center & Departure
itinerary.desc: Visit the Government Elephant Breeding Centre before departure.

title: GORKHA-BANDIPUR-POKHARA TOUR
tagline: An Authentic Cultural & Scenic Himalayan Journey
highlights: Historic Gorkha Durbar (Palace)
Preserved Newari culture of Bandipur
Sarangkot Sunrise over Annapurna range
Boat ride on Phewa Lake
Siddha Cave exploration
Relaxed pace suitable for all ages
description: This tour is a perfect blend of history, culture, nature, and relaxation. It takes you through Nepal's mid-hill countryside, offering deep insight into traditional lifestyles and ancient heritage.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel and trip briefing.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Explore Swayambhunath, Pashupatinath, Boudhanath, and Kathmandu Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Drive to Gorkha
itinerary.desc: Scenic drive to the historical town of Gorkha.

itinerary.title: Explore Gorkha
itinerary.desc: Visit Gorkha Durbar, Gorakhnath Temple, and enjoy views of the Manaslu range.

itinerary.title: Drive to Bandipur
itinerary.desc: Travel to the charming hilltop settlement of Bandipur.

itinerary.title: Explore Bandipur
itinerary.desc: Visit Siddha Cave, walk through Newari streets, and enjoy Himalayan views.

itinerary.title: Bandipur to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Short scenic drive to Nepal's most scenic lake city.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Davis Falls, Gupteshwor Cave, and International Mountain Museum.

itinerary.title: Sarangkot Sunrise
itinerary.desc: Early morning drive for sunrise over the Annapurna range.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day in Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Boating on Phewa Lake or optional adventure activities.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return journey along the Prithvi Highway.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Shopping or rest.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport.

title: BADIMALIKA TOUR
highlights: Sacred Badimalika Temple (4214m)
Khaptad National Park exploration
Remote Far-Western Nepal immersion
Unique religious significance (Tribeni)
High-altitude grasslands and forests
description: A deep spiritual and natural journey to the remote Far-Western region of Nepal, exploring high-altitude temples and the biodiverse Khaptad National Park.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Dadeldhura
itinerary.desc: Flight to Nepalgunj, then Dhangadhi, and drive to the hills of Dadeldhura.

itinerary.title: Approach to the Temple
itinerary.desc: Drive to Jadanga, trek through Budha Krodh and rhododendron forests to Bhitachhina.

itinerary.title: Tribeni & Badimalika Temple
itinerary.desc: Religious bathe at Tribeni and climb to the sacred Badimalika temple at 4214m.

itinerary.title: Descent through Grasslands
itinerary.desc: Trek via Dhalpuri Pokhari, Bhansainkharka, and Laskechaur.

itinerary.title: Khaptad National Park
itinerary.desc: Explore Khaptad Danda, Baba's Ashram, and the unique flora and fauna of the park.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Trek to Silgadhi, fly back to Kathmandu, and departure.

title: JEEP TOUR TO RARA
highlights: Rara Lake (2990m) - Biggest lake in Nepal
4WD Off-road Jeep adventure
Exotic Karnali region exploration
Sinja Valley historical site
Stunning Alpine scenery
description: Rara Lake Tour is one of the best destinations for wild travelers. The 4WD Jeep tour is a fascinating adventure overland journey to the exotic and stunning natural beauty of the biggest lake in Nepal.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Surkhet
itinerary.desc: Long drive through rivers and Terai region to reach Surkhet.

itinerary.title: Surkhet to Kalikot
itinerary.desc: Drive through subtropical vegetation and green valleys to Kalikot.

itinerary.title: Kalikot to Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Drive along the Karnali river, through Sinja Valley to reach Rara Lake.

itinerary.title: Excursion in Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Boating in the blue water, hiking for best views, and visiting the National Park.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kalikot
itinerary.desc: Return journey through the rugged terrain.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Final long drive back to the capital.

title: KATHMANDU CITY TOUR
highlights: Pashupatinath Temple (Holy Hindu Site)
Boudhanath Stupa (Massive Buddhist Site)
Swayambhunath (Monkey Temple)
Patan Durbar Square (Art & Architecture)
UNESCO World Heritage Site exploration
description: Kathmandu is the capital city of Nepal with a glorious history of two thousand years. This tour shows you the medieval gems, golden era architecture, and rich Newar culture.

itinerary.title: Pashupatinath & Boudhanath
itinerary.desc: Visit the holiest Hindu temple on the Bagmati bank and the largest stupa in Nepal.

itinerary.title: Swayambhunath & Patan
itinerary.desc: Panoramic views from the hill-top temple and explore the artistic palaces of Patan Durbar Square.

title: Trek to Mount Everest
tagline: Sagarmatha National Park - A World Heritage Experience
highlights: UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1979
Home to the top of the world - Sagarmatha (8,848m)
Explore famed Sherpa culture and Tengboche monastery
Rich Flora: Pine, Hemlock, Juniper, and Rhododendron
Diverse Fauna: Snow Leopard, Red Panda, and Musk Deer
Views of Lhotse, Cho Oyu, and Amadablam
description: Sagarmatha (Mt. Everest) National Park, established in 1976, covers 1,148 sq. km of the Himalayan ecological zone in the Khumbu region of Nepal. Ranging from 2,845m at Monjo to 8,848m at the summit of Everest, the park features rugged terrain, deep gorges, and some of the world's highest peaks. The famed Sherpa people live here, their lives deeply interwoven with Buddhism, centered around historic monasteries like Tengboche, Thame, and Pangboche. The park is home to the red panda, snow leopard, musk deer, Himalayan tahr, and over 118 species of birds including the Impeyan pheasant.

subPackages.name: AMADABLAM BASE CAMP
subPackages.details: A stunning trek to the base of one of the world's most beautiful mountains. Experience Sherpa hospitality and iconic Himalayan vistas.

subPackages.name: EVEREST BASE CAMP AND KALA PATHHAR
subPackages.details: The classic journey to the foot of Everest. Reach Kala Patthar for the most famous view of the world's highest peak.

subPackages.name: EVEREST PIKEY PEAK
subPackages.details: A shorter trek offering one of the best panoramic views of Everest and the surrounding ranges from a lower altitude.

subPackages.name: EVEREST (3 HIGH PASSES)
subPackages.details: The ultimate Everest challenge. Crossing Kongma La, Cho La, and Renjo La for a complete Khumbu circuit.

subPackages.name: TREK TO PHAPLU EVEREST BASE CAMP
subPackages.details: A traditional approach to EBC, following the old trail used by early expeditions before the Lukla airport was built.

title: Trek to Annapurna
tagline: Annapurna Conservation Area - A Sanctuary of Natural & Cultural Wonders
highlights: Thorong-la Pass: Legendary high-altitude pass (5,416m)
Kali Gandaki Gorge: The deepest gorge in the world
Muktinath Temple: Sacred pilgrimage site for Hindus & Buddhists
Tilicho Lake: One of the highest lakes in the world (4,919m)
Mosaic of Gurung, Magar, and Manangi communities
Gateway through Pokhara: The beautiful 'City of Lakes'
description: The Annapurna region of western Nepal is a world-renowned trekking destination, protected under the Annapurna Conservation Area Project (ACAP). Dominated by peaks like Annapurna I-IV, Dhaulagiri, and Machhapuchhre, the region features extreme elevational diversity—from sub-tropical lowland forests of oak and rhododendron to high alpine meadows and windswept desert plateaus bordering Tibet. Culturally, it is a treasure trove of Himalayan Buddhism and Hinduism, home to ancient monasteries and traditional festivals like Yartung.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA CIRCUIT WITH TILICHO LAKE
subPackages.details: A comprehensive journey circling the entire Annapurna massif, including a challenging detour to the turquoise waters of Tilicho Lake.

subPackages.name: TREK TO ANNAPURNA WITH NAMUN LA PASS
subPackages.details: A challenging off-the-beaten-path trek over the Namun La Pass (5,560m), connecting the Lamjung and Manang regions.

subPackages.name: LAMJUNG HIMAL TREK
subPackages.details: A quieter camping adventure offering unobstructed views of Manaslu and the Annapurna range through pristine Gurung villages.

subPackages.name: KHOPRA RIDGE TREK
subPackages.details: An excellent alternative to busier trails, offering incredible panoramic views of Dhaulagiri and a visit to the sacred Khayer Lake.

subPackages.name: MARDI HIMAL TREK
subPackages.details: A popular 'eco-trek' following a ridgeline toward the base of Machhapuchhre, offering some of the closest mountain views available.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA BASE CAMP - SHORT TRIP
subPackages.details: A fast-paced version of the sanctuary trek, ideal for those with limited time who still wish to stand at the foot of the world's 10th highest peak.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA CIRCUIT WITH NAR-PHU VALLEY
subPackages.details: An epic odyssey into the restricted Nar-Phu valleys, crossing Kang La and Thorong La for a complete Himalayan immersion.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA BASE CAMP VIA GHOREPANI
subPackages.details: A classic trek combining the famous sunrise views from Poon Hill with a deep trek into the Annapurna Sanctuary's natural amphitheater.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA SEVEN PASSES TREK
subPackages.details: The ultimate challenge crossing seven high-altitude passes, bypassing road-heavy sections for a true wilderness experience.

title: Trek to Langtang
tagline: The Valley of Glaciers & Tamang Culture
highlights: Kyanjin Gompa: Famous Buddhist monastery at 3,870m
Tserko Ri (4,984m): Incredible panoramic views of Langtang Lirung
Authentic Tamang Culture and hospitality
Red Panda Habitat: Exploring the dense forests of the National Park
Stunning Alpine landscapes and high-altitude lakes (Gosainkunda)
description: Langtang Valley, located north of Kathmandu, is a hidden gem offering spectacular mountain views, ancient monasteries, and a deep look into Tamang culture. Despite the 2015 earthquake, the valley has rebuilt stronger than ever, offering a resilient and welcoming spirit.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Syabrubesi (1,550m)
itinerary.desc: Scenic drive through hills and rivers.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lama Hotel (2,470m)
itinerary.desc: Walk through forests along the Langtang Khola.

itinerary.title: Trek to Langtang Village (3,430m)
itinerary.desc: Ascend through meadows with views of Langtang Lirung.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kyanjin Gompa (3,870m)
itinerary.desc: Reach the cultural and spiritual heart of the valley.

itinerary.title: Explore Tserko Ri (4,984m)
itinerary.desc: Acclimatization hike for the best views in the region.

itinerary.title: Trek back to Lama Hotel
itinerary.desc: Long descent through familiar trails.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Final trek to Syabrubesi and drive back.

title: Trek to Upper Mustang
highlights: Lo Manthang: The ancient walled capital of the Mustang Kingdom
Mysterious Sky Caves: Thousands of man-made caves in cliff faces
Tibetan Buddhist Culture: Untouched centuries-old traditions
Arid Desert Landscape: Contrasting red cliffs and deep canyons
Muktinath Temple: A sacred site for both Hindus and Buddhists
description: Upper Mustang, once a separate kingdom, is a high-altitude desert region bordering Tibet. Known for its stark beauty and deep-rooted Tibetan culture, this restricted region requires a special permit.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Scenic drive or flight to the lakeside city.

itinerary.title: Fly/Drive to Jomsom & Trek to Kagbeni
itinerary.desc: Enter the Kali Gandaki valley and the gateway to Mustang.

itinerary.title: Trek to Chele (3,050m)
itinerary.desc: Enter the restricted area and walk along the river bed.

itinerary.title: Trek to Syangboche (3,800m)
itinerary.desc: Cross several passes with panoramic views of the Annapurnas.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tsarang (3,560m)
itinerary.desc: Explore the large monastery and old palace of Tsarang.

itinerary.title: Lo Manthang (3,840m)
itinerary.desc: Reach the walled capital and spend two days exploring its four main monasteries.

itinerary.title: Return via Ghami & Samar
itinerary.desc: Take an alternative route back to Jomsom.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Fly back to Pokhara and return to the capital.

title: Trek to Manaslu & Tsum Valley
tagline: The Spirit of the Mountain Circuit
highlights: Larkya La Pass (5,106m): A challenging high-altitude crossing
Mount Manaslu (8,163m): 8th highest mountain in the world
Tsum Valley: A sacred and remote 'Hidden Valley' of Buddhism
Untouched Tibetan Culture: Remote villages and ancient monasteries
Diverse Flora & Fauna: From sub-tropical to alpine zones
description: The Manaslu Circuit is a stunning alternative to the Annapurna Circuit. This restricted region offers a raw and authentic Himalayan experience, encircling the massive Manaslu peak.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Machha Khola (870m)
itinerary.desc: Long drive into the Gorkha district.

itinerary.title: Ascent through Buri Gandaki
itinerary.desc: Trek through Jagat, Deng, and Namrung villages.

itinerary.title: Sama Gaon & Samdo (3,530m)
itinerary.desc: Acclimatization and exploration of the high Tibetan-style villages.

itinerary.title: Dharamsala (4,460m)
itinerary.desc: Base camp for the Larkya La pass.

itinerary.title: Cross Larkya La (5,106m)
itinerary.desc: Long day crossing the pass to Bimthang.

itinerary.title: Descent & Return
itinerary.desc: Trek down to Dharapani and drive back to Kathmandu.

title: Kailash Mansarovar
highlights: Mount Kailash (6,638m): The holiest mountain for four religions
Lake Mansarovar: Sacred high-altitude freshwater lake
Kailash Kora: The spiritual circumambulation of the peak
Dolma La Pass (5,630m): The highest point of the pilgrimage
Deep Spiritual Transformation and ancient Tibetan heritage
description: The pilgrimage to Mount Kailash and Lake Mansarovar in Tibet is considered one of the most sacred journeys on Earth. Shared by Hindus, Buddhists, Jains, and Bonpos.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Lhasa/Kerung
itinerary.desc: Travel from Nepal to the Tibetan plateau.

itinerary.title: Drive across Tibet to Lake Mansarovar
itinerary.desc: Journey across the vast arid landscape.

itinerary.title: Kailash Kora (The Circuit)
itinerary.desc: Three-day trek around the mountain crossing Dolma La.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Journey back through the border for departure.

title: Rara Region
tagline: The Blue Gem of the Far West
highlights: Rara Lake: Nepal's biggest and deepest freshwater lake (2,990m)
Chuchemara Peak (3,756m): Panoramic views of the lake and Himalayas
Remote Karnali Culture: Exploring untouched rural life
Rara National Park: Rich biodiversity including Red Pandas
Pristine Wilderness: A quiet alternative to busy trails
description: Trekking to Rara Lake in the remote Mugu district of Far-Western Nepal is a journey into a pristine wilderness. Surrounding by juniper and spruce forests.

itinerary.title: Fly Kathmandu to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Travel to the gateway of the Far-West.

itinerary.title: Fly to Jumla (2,370m)
itinerary.desc: Short mountain flight to the historic town of Jumla.

itinerary.title: Trek to Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Trek via Danphe Lagna and Chautha through high ridges.

itinerary.title: Excursion at Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Hike to Murma Top for the best view of the entire lake.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Trek back to Talcha airport and fly back via Nepalgunj.

title: Kanchanjunga Region
tagline: The Five Treasures of the Snow
highlights: Mount Kanchenjunga (8,586m): 3rd highest mountain in the world
North & South Base Camps: A complete exploration of the massif
Remote Eastern Nepal Culture: Limbu and Rai ethnic groups
Rich Wildlife: Habitats of the Snow Leopard and Red Panda
Diverse Landscapes: From tropical jungles to high glaciers
description: Kanchenjunga, in the far eastern corner of Nepal, offers a long and challenging trek through some of the most spectacular and remote scenery in the world.

itinerary.title: Flight to Bhadrapur & Drive to Taplejung
itinerary.desc: Journey to the far eastern hills.

itinerary.title: Trek to North Base Camp (Pangpema)
itinerary.desc: Ascend through Ghunsa and Lhonak to reach 5,143m.

itinerary.title: Cross High Passes to South Side
itinerary.desc: Cross Sele La and Mirgin La passes.

itinerary.title: South Base Camp (Oktang)
itinerary.desc: Explore the Yalung Glacier and south face.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Descend via Yamphudin and return by road/air.

title: Trek to Upper & Lower Dolpo
tagline: The Hidden Land of Bon & Blue Sheep
highlights: Phoksundo Lake: Stunning turquoise lake (3,611m) and highest waterfall
Shey Gompa: 800-year-old monastery and spiritual heart of Dolpo
Crystal Mountain: Sacred peak for the ancient Bon religion
Snow Leopard Territory: High chance of sightings in the wild
High Passes: Crossing Kang La (5,350m) and Saldang La
description: Dolpo is a vast, high-altitude region in the rain shadow of the Dhaulagiri range. Home to an ancient Tibetan culture and the pre-Buddhist Bon religion.

itinerary.title: Flight to Juphal via Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Travel into the remote Karnali region.

itinerary.title: Trek to Phoksundo Lake
itinerary.desc: Reach the deep turquoise lake and explore Ringmo village.

itinerary.title: Upper Dolpo & Shey Gompa
itinerary.desc: Cross Kang La pass into the inner forbidden valleys.

itinerary.title: Return via Saldang & Juphal
itinerary.desc: Long journey back through high deserts and return flight.

title: Trek to Makalu
tagline: The Garden of the Great Black One
highlights: Makalu Base Camp (4,870m): Views of Everest, Lhotse, and Baruntse
Makalu-Barun National Park: One of the world's richest biodiversity zones
Mount Makalu (8,485m): The world's 5th highest mountain
Pristine Wilderness: Quiet trails away from major trekking routes
High Alpine Passes: Crossing Shipton La (4,210m)
description: The trek to Makalu Base Camp is an outstanding journey into the heart of the Himalayas. The Barun Valley is a part of the Makalu-Barun National Park.

itinerary.title: Flight to Tumlingtar
itinerary.desc: Journey to the Arun valley.

itinerary.title: Ascent through the Barun Valley
itinerary.desc: Trek via Num, Seduwa, and Tashigaon.

itinerary.title: High Passes to Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Cross Shipton La and Keke La to reach the base camp.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Descend back through the valley and fly from Tumlingtar.

title: GHT Trail
highlights: Full Traverse of the Nepal Himalayas from East to West
Crossing the highest trekking passes in the world
Deep immersion in every major mountain culture of Nepal
The ultimate test of physical and mental endurance
Customizable into shorter regional segments
description: The Great Himalayan Trail (GHT) is the longest and highest alpine walking track in the world. It stretches the full length of the Nepal Himalayas.

itinerary.title: Eastern Nepal
itinerary.desc: Kanchenjunga and Makalu Barun regions.

itinerary.title: Central Nepal
itinerary.desc: Everest, Rolwaling, and Langtang regions.

itinerary.title: Western Nepal
itinerary.desc: Manaslu, Annapurna, and Upper Mustang.

itinerary.title: Far-Western Nepal
itinerary.desc: Dolpo, Rara, and Humla.

title: Buddhist Pilgrimage Trekking
tagline: A Spiritual Journey Through the Sacred Peaks
highlights: Visit Tengboche, Shey, and Kyanjin Gompas
Explore the birth place of Buddha and high-altitude monasteries
Deep cultural immersion in Sherpa and Tamang traditions
Meditation and prayer sessions in authentic settings
Stunning views of Everest and Annapurna ranges
description: This specialized trek is designed for those seeking spiritual enlightenment alongside physical adventure. Sacred sites and monasteries across the Himalayas.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Monastery Tour
itinerary.desc: Visit Swayambhunath and Boudhanath.

itinerary.title: Himalayan Pilgrimage
itinerary.desc: Customized route focusing on major monasteries (Tengboche or Kyanjin).

itinerary.title: Lumbini Extension
itinerary.desc: Final visit to the birth place of Buddha in the plains.

title: Dhaulagiri Circuit Trek
highlights: French Pass (5,360m): Crossing high-altitude glaciated passes
Mount Dhaulagiri (8,167m): 7th highest mountain in the world
Dhaulagiri Base Camp: Sleeping on the glacier
Hidden Valley: Crossing into the high desert landscape
True Wilderness: Camping adventure away from all teahouses
description: The Dhaulagiri Circuit is a challenging camping trek that circles the massive White Mountain (Dhaulagiri). Glaciated passes and incredible isolation.

itinerary.title: Drive to Darbang
itinerary.desc: The trek starts in the Myagdi hills.

itinerary.title: Approach through Chhonbardan Glacier
itinerary.desc: Trek via Muri, Boghara, and Italian Base Camp.

itinerary.title: Dhaulagiri Base Camp & French Pass
itinerary.desc: Reach 4,740m base camp and cross the high pass (5,360m).

itinerary.title: Hidden Valley & Dhampus Pass
itinerary.desc: Walk through the high altitude desert to Jomsom.

itinerary.title: Return via Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Fly to Pokhara and return to Kathmandu.

title: Trek to Far Western Nepal
highlights: Khaptad National Park: Unique high-altitude moorlands
Saipal Himal Base Camp: The gateway to the remote west
Unique Deuda and Far-Western culture
Rara Lake Extension: Visiting Nepal's blue gem
Absolute Isolation: Trails with zero tourist crowds
description: Far Western Nepal remains the least explored part of the country. Grasslands of Khaptad to the rugged peaks of Saipal Himal.

itinerary.title: Flight to Dhangadhi
itinerary.desc: Start from the western plains.

itinerary.title: Khaptad Exploration
itinerary.desc: Trek through the unique National Park and grasslands.

itinerary.title: Saipal Himal / Humla
itinerary.desc: Continue north toward the high Himalayan border regions.

itinerary.title: Return via Surkhet
itinerary.desc: Return drive and flight to Kathmandu.

title: TREK TO ANNAPURNA WITH NAMUN LA PASS
highlights: Namun La Pass (5,560m): High pass with 360-degree Himalayan views
Dudh Pokhari: Sacred glacial 'Milk Lake' at 4,650m
Sikles: One of Nepal's largest and best-preserved Gurung villages
True Wilderness: Off-the-beaten-path camping experience
Connects Lamjung and Manang regions via an ancient trade route
Panoramic vistas of Annapurna II and Lamjung Himal
description: The Namun La Pass trek follows an ancient Gurung trade route. Connecting Lamjung hills with the high-altitude desert of Manang.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel and trip briefing.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Scenic drive or short flight.

itinerary.title: Pokhara to Sikles (1,980m)
itinerary.desc: Drive to beautiful Gurung village.

itinerary.title: Ridge Trekking
itinerary.desc: Walk through forests and high pastures (Kori Danda).

itinerary.title: Cross Namun La (5,560m)
itinerary.desc: Challenging high pass crossing.

itinerary.title: Circuit & Return
itinerary.desc: Join circuit at Timang and return to Kathmandu.

title: LAMJUNG HIMAL TREK
highlights: Lamjung Himal Base Camp: Reaching 4,500m in the heart of the range
Ghalegaun: Famous honey-hunting village and Gurung cultural hub
Unobstructed views of Manaslu, Annapurna, and Machapuchare
Traditional camping experience away from tourist crowds
Dense rhododendron and oak forests with rich wildlife
description: Hidden gem in the Annapurna region. Camping adventure through traditional Gurung villages and pristine forests.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive to Besisahar
itinerary.desc: Gateway to the hills.

itinerary.title: Gurung Villages
itinerary.desc: Explore Ghalegaun and Maidu forests.

itinerary.title: Base Camp Ascent
itinerary.desc: Reach 4,500m at foot of Lamjung Himal.

itinerary.title: Sikles & Return
itinerary.desc: Descend to Sikles and return via Pokhara.

title: ANNAPURNA CIRCUIT WITH NAR-PHU VALLEY
tagline: The Forbidden Valleys & High Passes Odyssey
highlights: Kang La Pass (5,322m) & Thorong La Pass (5,416m)
Restricted Nar & Phu Valleys: Authentic Tibetan-style villages
Ancient Tashi Lhakhang Monastery in Phu village
Tilicho Lake (4,919m): One of the highest lakes in the world
description: Combines classic circuit with remote restricted valleys. Stone villages, hidden monasteries, and massive peaks.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Koto
itinerary.desc: Drive and start restricted canyon trails.

itinerary.title: Nar & Phu exploration
itinerary.desc: Explore ancient villages and cross Kang La (5,322m).

itinerary.title: Tilicho detour
itinerary.desc: Visit the high glacial lake (4,919m).

itinerary.title: High Pass & Finish
itinerary.desc: Cross Thorong La (5,416m) and descend via Mustang.

title: ANNAPURNA SEVEN PASSES TREK
tagline: The Ultimate Wilderness & High Pass Challenge
highlights: Cross Seven High Passes including Thorong La and Kang La
Explore the restricted Nar & Phu valleys and hidden Manang
Complete bypass of road-heavy sections of the traditional circuit
description: تجربه raw and uncompromised form. Bypasses modern roads through hidden valleys and over ancient trails.

itinerary.title: First Three Passes
itinerary.desc: Trek through Tachai and cross Kuchumro, Yarcha, Meta passes.

itinerary.title: Nar Phu & Kang La
itinerary.desc: Explore restricted valleys and cross 5,320m pass.

itinerary.title: Thorong La & Finish
itinerary.desc: Final high pass (5,416m) and return to Kathmandu.

title: ANNAPURNA CIRCUIT WITH TILICHO LAKE
highlights: Thorong La Pass: The highest trekking pass in the world (5,416m)
Tilicho Lake: Visit one of the highest glacial lakes in the world (4,919m)
Muktinath: Sacred pilgrimage site for Hindus and Buddhists
description: Legendary challenge. Transitions from lush valleys to high desert plateaus.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Manang
itinerary.desc: Ascent along Marshyangdi River via Chame.

itinerary.title: Tilicho Detour
itinerary.desc: Visit 4,919m lake and back to trail.

itinerary.title: High Pass
itinerary.desc: Cross Thorong La (5,416m) to Muktinath.

itinerary.title: Descent & Finish
itinerary.desc: Via Tatopani hot springs and Poon Hill.

title: KHOPRA RIDGE TREK
highlights: Khayer Lake: A sacred high-altitude glacial lake (4,660m)
Mulde Peak: Panoramic views rivaling Poon Hill
Front-row views of Mt. Dhaulagiri and Annapurna South
description: Stunning alternative. Ridge-top walking with constant views and sacred lake visit.

itinerary.title: Approach via Ghandruk
itinerary.desc: Trek through heritage villages and forests.

itinerary.title: Ridge & Lake
itinerary.desc: Mulde Peak sunrise and Khayer Lake (4,660m).

itinerary.title: Return via Poon Hill
itinerary.desc: Descend via Ghorepani and return to Pokhara.

title: ANNAPURNA BASE CAMP - SHORT TRIP
highlights: Reach Annapurna Base Camp (4,130m) in record time
Stunning 360-degree mountain views within the Sanctuary
description: Full sanctuary experience for those with limited time. Standing at foot of world's 10th highest peak.

itinerary.title: Fast Ascent
itinerary.desc: Via Ghandruk and Bamboo forests.

itinerary.title: Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Reach 4,130m Sanctuary.

itinerary.title: Quick Descent
itinerary.desc: Via Jhinu hot springs to Pokhara.

title: ANNAPURNA BASE CAMP VIA GHOREPANI
tagline: A Journey into the Heart of the Annapurna Sanctuary
highlights: Poon Hill Sunrise: Iconic views of Dhaulagiri and Annapurna massifs
Annapurna Sanctuary: Natural amphitheater surrounded by 7000m+ peaks
description: Iconic journey. Includes famous Poon Hill viewpoint and deep sanctuary trek.

itinerary.title: Poon Hill Loop
itinerary.desc: Sunrise views and lush rhododendron forests.

itinerary.title: Sanctuary Ascent
itinerary.desc: Reach ABC (4,130m) via Machhapuchhre BC.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Via Jhinu hot springs and return to Kathmandu.

title: MARDI HIMAL TREK
highlights: Spectacular 'birds-eye' views of the Annapurna Sanctuary
Standing directly at the foot of the iconic Machhapuchhre
description: Narrow ridgeline toward base of Mardi Himal and Fishtail. Quiet trails, grand vistas.

itinerary.title: Approach via Kande
itinerary.desc: Australian Camp and Forest Camp.

itinerary.title: Ridge Ascent
itinerary.desc: Reach High Camp and Mardi Base Camp (4,500m).

itinerary.title: Descent via Siding
itinerary.desc: Return to Pokhara and Kathmandu.

title: Trek to Langtang
tagline: The Valley of Glaciers & Tamang Culture
highlights: Kyanjin Gompa: Famous Buddhist monastery at 3,870m
Tserko Ri (4,984m): Incredible panoramic views of Langtang Lirung
Authentic Tamang Culture and hospitality
description: Langtang Valley, north of Kathmandu, offers spectacular views and deep culture. Despite the earthquake, it remains a resilient gem.

subPackages.name: LANGTANG VALLEY TREK
subPackages.details: The classic journey to Kyanjin Gompa.

subPackages.name: GOSAINKUNDA LAKE TREK
subPackages.details: Spiritual trek to sacred alpine lakes.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Kyanjin
itinerary.desc: Drive to Syabrubesi and trek through Lama Hotel.

itinerary.title: Tserko Ri & Return
itinerary.desc: Acclimatization hike (4,984m) and trek back to Syabrubesi.

title: Trek to Upper Mustang
highlights: Lo Manthang: The ancient walled capital
Mysterious Sky Caves in cliff faces
Untouched Tibetan Buddhist Culture
description: High-altitude desert region bordering Tibet. Ancient monasteries and medieval walled cities.

itinerary.title: Gateway to Mustang
itinerary.desc: Fly to Jomsom and trek through Kagbeni and Chele.

itinerary.title: Lo Manthang
itinerary.desc: Explore the walled capital and its ancient monasteries.

itinerary.title: Return via Ghami
itinerary.desc: Alternative trails back to Jomsom and Pokhara.

title: Trek to Manaslu & Tsum Valley
tagline: The Spirit of the Mountain Circuit
highlights: Larkya La Pass (5,106m): Challenging crossing
Mount Manaslu (8,163m): 8th highest mountain
Tsum Valley: Sacred 'Hidden Valley'
description: Stunning alternative to Annapurna. Raw Himalayan experience encircling the massive Manaslu peak.

subPackages.name: MANASLU CIRCUIT TREK
subPackages.details: Loop around Mt. Manaslu via Larkya La.

itinerary.title: Ascent to Phedi
itinerary.desc: Trek through Jagat and Samdo villages.

itinerary.title: The High Pass
itinerary.desc: Cross Larkya La (5,106m) and descend to Dharapani.

title: Kailash Mansarovar
highlights: Mount Kailash: The holiest mountain
Lake Mansarovar: Sacred freshwater lake
Kailash Kora spiritual circuit
description: Profound spiritual experience across the high-altitude Tibetan plateau. Cross-border pilgrimage.

itinerary.title: Journey to Tibet
itinerary.desc: Kathmandu to Mansarovar via Kerung border.

itinerary.title: The Kora
itinerary.desc: Three-day trek around Kailash crossing Dolma La.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Back to Nepal border and Kathmandu.

title: Rara Region
tagline: The Blue Gem of the Far West
highlights: Rara Lake: Nepal's biggest freshwater lake
Remote Karnali culture and wilderness
description: Pristine wilderness in remote Mugu district. Deep blue lake surrounded by alpine forests.

itinerary.title: Accessing the West
itinerary.desc: Fly to Jumla via Nepalgunj and trek north.

itinerary.title: Lake Exploration
itinerary.desc: Boating and Murma Top hike for lake views.

title: Kanchanjunga Region
tagline: The Five Treasures of the Snow
highlights: Mount Kanchenjunga (8,586m): 3rd highest
North & South Base Camps exploration
description: Remote Eastern Nepal odyssey. Challenging trails, massive scale, and absolute isolation.

itinerary.title: North Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Flight to Bhadrapur and trek to Pangpema (5,143m).

itinerary.title: South Side Circuit
itinerary.desc: Cross high passes to Oktang and return.

title: Trek to Upper & Lower Dolpo
tagline: The Hidden Land of Bon & Blue Sheep
highlights: Phoksundo Lake: Turquoise alpine gem
Shey Gompa: 800-year-old monastery
description: High-altitude region in the rain shadow. Ancient Tibetan culture and pre-Buddhist Bon religion.

subPackages.name: UPPER DOLPO TREK
subPackages.details: The ultimate odyssey into inner forbidden valleys.

itinerary.title: Phoksundo Lake
itinerary.desc: Flight to Juphal and trek to the sacred lake.

itinerary.title: Inner Dolpo
itinerary.desc: Cross Kang La pass to Shey Gompa and back.

title: Trek to Makalu
tagline: The Garden of the Great Black One
highlights: Makalu Base Camp: Views of Everest & Lhotse
World's richest biodiversity zones
description: Outstanding journey into the heart of the Himalayas. Combination of lush forests and glaciers.

itinerary.title: Ascent to Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Trek via Tashigaon and cross Shipton La.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.desc: Descend Barun valley to Tumlingtar.

title: GHT Trail
highlights: Full Traverse of Nepal East to West
Highest trekking passes in the world
description: Longest and highest alpine track. Stretching full length of Nepal Himalayas.

itinerary.title: East to West
itinerary.desc: Kanchenjunga to Humla traverse.

title: Buddhist Pilgrimage Trekking
tagline: A Spiritual Journey Through the Sacred Peaks
highlights: Visit Tengboche and Shey Gompas
Cultural immersion in Sherpa traditions
description: Spiritual enlightenment alongside physical adventure. Follow footsteps of great masters.

itinerary.title: Pilgrimage Route
itinerary.desc: Customized route through major monasteries.

title: Dhaulagiri Circuit Trek
highlights: French Pass (5,360m): Glaciated pass
Mount Dhaulagiri (8,167m) circuit
description: Challenging camping trek circling the White Mountain. Glaciated walking and isolation.

itinerary.title: Glacier Approach
itinerary.desc: Trek from Darbang to Dhaulagiri Base Camp.

itinerary.title: Hidden Valley
itinerary.desc: Cross French Pass to Jomsom and Pokhara.

title: Trek to Far Western Nepal
highlights: Khaptad National Park moorlands
Unique Deuda and local culture
description: Least explored part of Nepal. High altitude grasslands and rugged border peaks.

itinerary.title: West Frontier
itinerary.desc: Exploration of Khaptad and Saipal Himal.
